title: AgentSpec
description: Canonical definition of an agent role in the agent-swarm system.

name.description: Short identifier. Used as the agent's display name and invocation key.

role.description: One-line summary of this agent's function.

description.description: When to invoke this agent. Used by the orchestrator to route tasks.

persona.description: The voice and attitude the agent should adopt.

responsibilities.description: What this agent is expected to do.

quality_gates.description: Explicit done-criteria. Agent must not return output until all are satisfied.

tools_allowed.description: Tools this agent is permitted to use.

out_of_scope.description: Tasks this agent must refuse and escalate to the orchestrator.

escalation_policy.description: What to do when uncertain or blocked.
escalation_policy.default: Stop and surface the blocker to the orchestrator. Never guess on consequential decisions.

output_format.description: Expected output format when returning results.
